title: baseline_contract record
description: Append a typed baseline/metric contract (one per baseline pass) that STRENGTHENS the existing quest.baseline_gate. The rich content (metric_ids[], validity_threats[]) lives in the contract_ref artifact; this row promotes the gate-relevant scalars. Acceptability is VALIDATOR-computed: `baseline validate` sets the `valid` flag (author cannot self-certify), checking baseline_route + metric/comparison policy + dataset/split/eval protocol (or waiver) + route-specific verification (reproduced -> provenance-backed result; imported/trusted -> citation; waived -> reason). The baseline gate then requires: baseline_gate=passed -> a validated contract (valid=1) on a real route; baseline_gate=waived -> a validated waiver (valid=1, baseline_route='waived').

baseline_route.description: How the baseline is verified. 'reproduced' = a local run (evidence_ref must point to a baseline result_id with validated provenance). 'imported'/'trusted' = a non-execution route (evidence_ref must cite a source/paper/leaderboard). 'waived' = no baseline (waiver_reason required). Validator-gated: `baseline validate` computes the `valid` flag from this; the author cannot self-certify via verification_verdict alone.

evidence_ref.description: Route-dependent evidence: a baseline result_id (reproduced) or a citation/source/note (imported/trusted).
